```python
import json
from pathlib import Path

# 读取各agent的result.txt
base_dir = Path("/Users/tomato/Documents/potato/project/YFD/yfd-agent-consensus/results/agent_consensus_batch/default_run/task_01_macd_rsi_filter/revised")

agents_with_results = []

for agent in ["ga", "codex", "claudecode", "openclaw"]:
    result_file = base_dir / agent / "result.txt"
    if result_file.exists():
        content = result_file.read_text().strip()
        agents_with_results.append({
            "agent": agent,
            "content": content,
            "lines": content.splitlines() if content else [],
            "count": len([l for l in content.splitlines() if l.strip()]) if content else 0
        })
        print(f"\n{'='*60}")
        print(f"Agent: {agent}")
        print(f"{'='*60}")
        print(content)
    else:
        print(f"\n{'='*60}")
        print(f"Agent: {agent} - NO result.txt")
        print(f"{'='*60}")

print(f"\n\n{'='*60}")
print("Summary:")
print(f"{'='*60}")
for item in agents_with_results:
    print(f"{item['agent']}: {item['count']} stocks")
```
